patterns: Show me what you can do
responses: I can answer questions, search the web, generate images, and analyze photos. Type /help to see all commands!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta!
Why did the chatbot go to school? To improve its language model!
Python is a high-level, versatile programming language known for its clean syntax. It's widely used in AI, web development, data science, and automation.
NLP stands for Natural Language Processing — it's how computers understand and process human language. This chatbot uses NLP to understand your messages!
Machine Learning is a type of AI where computers learn from data to make decisions without being explicitly programmed. This chatbot uses ML to classify your messages!
